title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aurobindo Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aurobindo Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
